/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/niripwmenu.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/niripwmenu.dir/niripwmenu_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/niripwmenu.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/niripwmenu.dir/src/configmanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/niripwmenu.dir/niripwmenu_qmltyperegistrations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/niripwmenu.dir/build2/.qt/rcc/qrc_qmake_niripwmenu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/niripwmenu.dir/build2/.rcc/qmlcache/niripwmenu_qmlcache_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/niripwmenu.dir/build2/.rcc/qmlcache/niripwmenu_src/qml/Main_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/niripwmenu.dir/build2/.rcc/qmlcache/niripwmenu_src/qml/Style_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/niripwmenu.dir/build2/.qt/rcc/qrc_niripwmenu_raw_qml_0.cpp.o CMakeFiles/niripwmenu.dir/build2/.qt/rcc/qrc_niripwmenu_raw_qml_0_extra_qmldirs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/niripwmenu.dir/build2/.qt/rcc/qrc_data.cpp.o -o niripwmenu  -Wl,-rpath,:::::::::::::::::::::: /usr/lib/libQt6QuickControls2.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Quick.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0
